CONTENT.Professional career: On 4 January 2020, Samuel signed with Portimonense from Coritiba. Samuel made his professional debut with Portimonense in a 1–1 Primeira Liga tie with Paços de Ferreira on 21 September 2020, saving a penalty on his debut.On 1 September 2022, Portugal signed a five-year contract with fellow Primeira Liga side FC Porto, for a reported fee of €4 million.

SUMMARY: Samuel Portugal Lima (born 29 March 1994) is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Primeira Liga club Porto.
